description_long: This is a rectangular office desk with a light wood grain finish and a modern, minimalist design. The desk features a spacious flat tabletop supported by sturdy metal legs, with a set of two drawers on the right side for storage. The drawers have integrated yellow handles, adding a subtle accent to the otherwise neutral color palette. The left side of the desk is open, providing ample legroom for the user. The metal legs are painted black and silver, contributing to the desk's contemporary aesthetic and stability. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for professional or home office environments.
description: A modern rectangular office desk with a light wood finish, metal legs, and two right-side drawers with yellow handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop, two right-side drawers with yellow handles, and open legroom on the left.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the full height of the drawer unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back panel and the side of the drawer unit.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the open leg space and the supporting metal legs.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and open legroom, intended for the user to sit facing the drawers with the open space for their legs.
